issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text says 'during this turn' which means the effect lasts only while it's your turn, not until end of turn.
Effect is missing optional condition. 'You may' indicates this should be optional/conditional. Current DSL shows all actions as mandatory.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may give your 1 active Leader −5000 power during this turn: Draw 1 card and trash 1 card from your hand.
